Reason: Reason: 'volume_extension:volume_type_encryption' was a convenience policy that allowed you to set all volume encryption type policies to the same value.  We are deprecating this rule to prepare for a future release in which the default values for policies that read, create/update, and delete encryption types will be different from each other.. Reason: Reason: 'volume_extension:volume_type_encryption' was a convenience policy that allowed you to set all volume encryption type policies to the same value.
